indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: uncomfortable seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: The bed is not suitable for prolonged computer use due to its softness and lack of ergonomic support.

indicators.name: low lighting levels
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears to be ambient rather than task-specific, which is inadequate for computer work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat work surface, comfortable seating, and adequate lighting make it unsuitable for extended computer use.
